user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jessica Kemp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWA1JLn7iCEn1I2w1SZwqbMvEkxak8GwO208IFdw3epQ5LVANQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"11/10 highly recommend!

I found Angie after searching through multiple Facebook groups and checking the recommendations. She comes highly recommended from so many different women over so many different groups.

She lives up to her hype.

We had an in depth consultation in her seriously gorgeous (and super calming) clinic.

She really took the time to hear me out and talked through all the options and her recommendations. She has so much knowledge! And is not one for overdoing anything.

I came back today to get some old under eye filler dissolved. I had been well prepared
, and it went so much better than I had hoped for.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lydia Putri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSkpoZkYYsNl_Oo4W2D48-VLlfOH-O56heQABoJBLLq6g4wAsp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an incredible experience with Bangkok Plastic Surgery for my breast surgery. I actually found this clinic last minute before flying to Bangkok, and I feel so lucky that I did.

From the very beginning, their team responded incredibly fast and answered all my questions with patience and professionalism. It made me feel safe and confident choosing them even before I arrived in Thailand.

The prices were very reasonable and affordable, but the service and care I received felt truly premium.

I especially want to thank Miss Tak, the manager, who was absolutely amazing. She arranged transportation for me as a special customer and helped coordinate everything smoothly. She explained every detail of the procedure and made sure I was comfortable the entire time. Her kindness and professionalism made a huge difference in my experience.

The clinic itself was very clean, modern, and well organized. The whole team was friendly and supportive throughout my surgery journey.

A big thank you to Mr. Pichet and the entire medical team for helping me achieve my dream breast surgery. I’m so grateful for their care and expertise.

If anyone is looking for a trustworthy and professional plastic surgery clinic in Bangkok, I highly recommend Bangkok Plastic Surgery.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESc8NWCkZ1j7Y9ipvRqr1zn0LsGjn5jcBsD9B-YuM4u7lYNxdzRbyfqwYWXRNleQ5wZiFgFR84ge4_Qtjf9Cb1GQG4eNvmwfzoNxLSa5wTqGEV3PQOj4hiaBvfYYgfFlmfY4ytFJKvEstBq","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETtS2j1vvNTzaZNIS2x9DF3q0hljBuaX4JSSh0FOJdT__HZF4U2resbolj5wLikZBWHRmvCdmQLqgVQdCNeGr6omhDF5_-WjZNdmUoZ7WXIFb2erOskKpgGDdZ2q-93LesIM4QsJtISajY"],"When":"2026-3-9"},{"Name":"Tiffany Anne Applegarth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYnbgtzMVieGWYBKi1TeyCIfPdE1O-EQLXhFTRbMNtpE0IvL7D=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent care and staff,  providing superb after care, with an outstanding team of nurses.  All the staff and medical team were friendly, helpful, but professional.
I underwent a scrotal skin graft vaginaplasty with full orchiectomy.  Now this is a complex and lengthy operation, but all pre-op checks were thorough, including chest x-ray, ECG (EKG), and interview with psychiatrist/Phycologist and all included in package.
The operation seemed to go well, and spent 4 days in the clinic recovering, and looked after by nurse team.  Then, well for me, when all the dressings came off and packing removed,  I had suffered greater than usual swelling,  above normal, but was reassured by the Surgeon,  everything would be OK.  Which it was :)
I had to wait for 2 weeks of recovery from Initial operation and general anaesthetic,  but was then taken back under for corrective surgery, to correct my adverse swelling.  This was all included and was to provide the results I had expected and the Dr had reassured me that they would be.  This surgery was basically a Libia-Plasty, to ensure a better natural looking result, and to reduce where the swelling that was in excess.
The dressings came off the same day, but redressed for the night, to avoid any chances of infection. The next day, everything was removed, and the results were much more pleasing and as expected.
I was certified fit to fly, as my flights home were just the next day.
On return to UK. I got myself re-checked by medical team, just for my own peace of mind, and to ensure I was following correct care procedures.
I was comforted to find out everything did look good, no signs of possible infections,  and the care plan given was robust,  and I had nothing to worry about.
So all in all, a great service provided, with a good outcome, great after care, and was given great advice to follow on returning home, to keep healthy and recover well.   I would recommend the BPS clinic to friends and others who are looking for advice.
I would like to thank, Dr Pichet Richardson,  Ms Tak and her team, for my care whilst in Bangkok, and for going above and beyond in keeping me safe and well.
Tiffany Anne x","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cyrene Leonard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvbkkWC7w5a9aQr27kklQJ5unN9sf_xpVCFmeElEPQhSoHKm4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the best experience at Bangkok Plastic Surgery. This was my first time ever having surgery, and on top of that it was in a different country, so I was really nervous. Miss Pak and her team made me feel comfortable from the very start.

The clinic and facilities are great, everyone is so welcoming, and everything ran smoothly and efficiently. Communication before the surgery was quick, clear, and really detailed.

Dr. Pichet was wonderful and I am incredibly happy with the results!

Thank you so much to everyone at BPS. I would highly recommend them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christian H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlcxtvW7hXSyMF6VmOn8aU6HOX5lGBH5GBvF3NX3L4x4DpCg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I had an outstanding experience with Facial Feminization Surgery (FFS) at Bangkok Plastic Surgery and can highly recommend this clinic.

Dr. Pitched did an exceptional job — extremely professional, highly skilled, and with an excellent understanding of facial feminization. From the first consultation to the final results, I felt safe, respected, and in the best possible hands. The outcome looks natural and beautifully balanced, and it has exceeded my expectations.

A very special thank you to Ms. Tak for her excellent care and support throughout the entire process. She was always kind, attentive, and incredibly helpful, explaining every step clearly and making sure all details were perfectly organized. Her support made the whole experience smooth, comfortable, and stress-free.

Overall, Bangkok Plastic Surgery offers outstanding expertise in facial feminization combined with warm, professional, and compassionate patient care. I am truly grateful to the entire team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Becca Ramsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfzUiJrEzUs5I3rIcDU-V3lqtj9OU_uWkLfrRSAT0GsPgeRA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can not say enough positive things about BPS! From the first text message, months out, to the surgery day, and all through recovery - I felt lots of comfort and peace about the surgery. I know have had 3 surgeries with them (breast enlargement and lipedema removal surgery). I fly from America just because the service is always 5 star! Tak, one of the nurses answers every one of my text messages and questions! She always makes sure my pain is managed, when I am nerves - she calms me, and makes sure that all travel back and forth is smooth. She prepares enough supplies so that once you leave the country, you have everything you need. All of the nurses there take the BEST care of you. I needed to wash my hair and I could not and they did it + blow dried it for me?!? You will NEVER find this care anywhere else. Dr. Pichet will answer all of my text messages with question months before surgery and months after surgery. He truly cares about each of his patients and does an amazing job! The driver that takes you back and forth to the hotel is top notch. Always on time, a great driver, and he would stop and let me get a smoothie on the way home! I would recommend Bangkok Plastic Surgery to anyone! 5 STARS!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richenda Ingram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUf4zFLfaUUy-WDSEVeNBcv9Y9S5OaOj_JzvU7SDikQAlp0mO7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am truly pleased with the results of my procedure at Bangkok Plastic Surgery. From the very beginning, I found BPS to be a close-knit, highly professional team who carried out their work with care, diligence, and compassion.

Dr. Pitchet, who leads the practice, is both distinguished and gentle. He doesn’t need many words — his presence, gestures, and warm smile speak volumes. The atmosphere, already one of genuine care, rises to another level of calm focus when he enters the room, and his staff respond attentively to his few but thoughtful directions.

The practice is managed by Miss Tak, whose cheeky, joyous personality immediately puts you at ease. She explains the procedure in detail, guides you through the paperwork, and makes herself available almost around the clock — a reassurance I greatly appreciated, even if I didn’t need to call on it. The wider team — including Miss Ann, Miss Tim, and Miss Koy — provided attentive, professional care, handling everything from blood tests and heart checks to X-rays with kindness and thoroughness.

After the procedure the aftercare continues seamlessly. Checkups, and ongoing aftercare are all carefully managed by Miss Tak. Miss Tak remains a constant source of support, putting you at ease, guiding you step by step through recovery and reminding you of important milestones as life gradually returns to normal.

Bangkok Plastic Surgery is a tightly run, humble, yet exceptionally professional practice. I am deeply grateful for their expertise, their kindness, and the outstanding care they provided at every stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jerry Tan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdDEfuyo8CoHwCUOea3EtsrvsTKHS39Ipw4PXUBaRyLx_RpLlS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service beyond my expectations! Doctor was very skilful and experience no pain from my procedure. Price quoted was reasonable and all inclusive like medication, compression garments, dressing, meals and transport. The best and most friendly staffs and nurses I ever experienced. Highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sam Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDAZJwLLNuZ1KuB6SDkMOu3IPaxq20FNfFS_LSRSPvRTl1RkUONA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have to say how great the work and this clinic is. Aside from Dr. Pichet being an experienced surgeon his main right hand  surgical nurse is Tak. She is amazing as she not only guides you through the entire process but at any time before or especially after the surgery she answers every question , provides medical support  and is in my opinion, one of the top surgical assistants i have come across. Tak is a true winner just as this clinic also is. Thanks","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ayah Helmy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCMa4CnfzTlpIimlZ5eoBb7yXXXyyXM42NGwkyjyf_W7HhUOkw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have a complicated surgical history and cannot recommend Dr Rahban and his team enough. I am an attorney and entrepreneur, so I do my research and I expect good results for the money that I spend. I am very pleased with my experience and my results with Dr R.

It was a tall order for me to find the right doctor because not only was I looking for a doctor who specializes in post-weight loss body lifts, but one who specializes in revisions. I waited until I have had about 8 months of healing and normalizing since my first surgery to post this review because I wanted to be thorough and honest. And, honestly, I can recommend both Dr Rahban and his team without reservation. Not only are they friendly and helpful, but I am quite particular about my results and so is Dr Rahban. He is meticulous in his work and his incisions are very precise. Despite all the scarring and unconventional issues I am bringing to his surgical table, he has been able to give me results that have really shifted my self perception and improved my life- even with 2 out of 3 surgeries left to go!

Thank you, Dr R and team. I look forward to continuing to work with you to achieve my dream body. See you all soon :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Cortes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJN9MElgvntDSpPViCYEEVhDngW351R5XwhAvkU1g8z10HNZDv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got a breast reduction surgery on October 10,2025 with Dr. Rahban. My breast reduction surgery is something I had considered and needed for almost 10 years before finally deciding to move forward. After extensive research and multiple consultations, I chose Dr. Rahban, and I couldn’t be happier with that decision.
From the very first appointment, I appreciated Dr. Rahban’s honesty and knowledge. He thoroughly explained every detail of the procedure, why he chose a specific method, how it would benefit my body, and what would realistically work for me. He set clear and realistic expectations, which made me feel confident and informed. His attention to detail is truly impressive—he noticed that my skin was extremely prone to scarring based on past injuries, something I didn’t even mention, and was able to determine this during our first consultation.
I am now a little over three months post-op, approaching four months, and my scarring is minimal compared to what I had anticipated. Some areas are still healing, but the most visible parts have little to no scarring at all. This has helped tremendously with my confidence, especially in an area I’ve always felt self-conscious about due to the size of my breasts. I am incredibly grateful for the care and time Dr. Rahban took to minimize scarring and prioritize the long-term results.
The preparation and care provided by Dr. Rahban and his entire team—from the initial consultation to surgery day and post-operative care—are absolutely crucial, especially for a procedure as complex as a breast reduction. Every team member played an important role in my journey: Layla during my initial inquiry, Tiffany greeting me at the front desk, Sally helping schedule my appointments, Dr. Rahban answering every question and easing my anxiety at each visit, and Lety providing thorough pre- and post-operative care instructions. Together, they made a huge impact on both my physical and mental well-being throughout this experience.
This was my first major surgery, and I couldn’t be more thankful for my choice of Dr. Rahban and his team. I would absolutely consider Dr. Rahban for any future procedures and will confidently recommend him to my family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ben Nab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPBh02qQb4fSqdAu5gHq291hh3qmh1AzJc-0yrbt8rxCY3j1A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would like to extend my sincere appreciation to Dr. Rahban and his entire staff for taking exceptional care of me with outstanding professionalism and compassion. As a medical provider with many years of experience, I had extremely high standards when choosing a plastic surgeon for my tummy tuck after two C-sections.
I consulted with more than five surgeons and took three years to make my decision. I can confidently say there is no one I would trust more than Dr. Rahban. What truly sets him apart is that he does everything himself, which gave me complete confidence in my care and results. His approach is comprehensive, safe, precise, and artistic, and he genuinely cares about how his results look. Dr. Rahban treats each patient with the highest level of attention and integrity, and it clearly shows in his Work.  High Recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Kinzel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiSBJNdqmUlx28Q5RLSmbfEls55ILqGy-8XFJgoFrIM97SSc0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One year anniversary of my abdominoplasty, and my only regret is that I didn’t do it sooner. It changed my life.

For years I struggled with abdominal pain, core weakness, and a stomach that never improved despite diet and exercise. After having giant babies,  no amount of exercise was helping to repair me. I tried everything before considering surgery—years of physical therapy, strengthening programs, local consultations, Emsculpt, anything I could find besides surgery.

I asked my OBGYN for a consultation with a surgeon, to see what my options were. She reluctantly referred me, and when I consulted with the VA surgeon, he matter-of-factly told me that surgery would not change my quality of life or the pain. After living with my results for a year, I can confidently say that for me, his statement was not true.

Emotionally, it was difficult at times as well. I remember overhearing strangers wondering if I was drinking while pregnant, or commenting while I was at the beach catching waves with my kids about how I was doing that while pregnant. Those moments stayed with me. I know I shouldn’t let other people’s opinion bother me, but it definitely bummed me out.

After years of contemplating,  I met two women within a months time, who had undergone abdominoplasty with muscle repair. One had surgery locally. She initially told me she was very happy and encouraged me to just do it because she had no regrets. A few months later, however, she shared that she was having complications and would need another surgery. Another woman I met had her surgery with Dr. Rahban and told me he was absolutely the best surgeon and that she never once regretted the investment because of how much better she felt afterward. Hearing both of those experiences played a big role in my decision to have the surgery. I was happy to have ran into the one gal that mentioned Dr. Rahban, because I had already done a ton of research on him back in 2019, and she assured me that he truly was as great as he seemed. That’s when I made the call and scheduled my consultation. After my consultation, I knew that Dr. Rahban was who I wanted as my surgeon.

Since my surgery, my core is stronger than it has been in 14 years. I’m finally able to work out and see real results again. I also haven’t had a single abdominal “Charlie horse” since surgery, which used to happen regularly (so painful). The improvement in my strength and physical comfort has truly changed.

I feel more confident, more comfortable in my body, and I am able to keep up with my very active kids and family again.

I’m so glad I made that call and scheduled the consultation. I never once felt rushed or pressured. Everyone in the office was kind, supportive, and professional, and I’m incredibly grateful for the care I received.

If you’re on the fence like I was for years, I would encourage you to at the least schedule the consultation. I’m so thankful I met someone who encouraged me to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"heather desurvire","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrL2tJKDloUsB_vP0uSVkQHB_dKFlDYES5EABCrotQLkyC4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In the past I’ve had experiences both good and very bad with cosmetic surgeons. I am quite discerning as a result when choosing a surgeon. Dr Rahban, from the onset, gave me the confidence I was with an expert surgeon who is not only meticulous, precise, extremely knowledgeable but also a perfectionist. All the qualities you’d want in a surgeon.

In the past I unfortunately had liposuction about 20 years ago on my stomach and upper arms. After a few years, the result unfortunately and unexpectedly l to get scar tissue that created an awfully bumpy and quite ughly stomach and crinkly upper arms with bumps and crevices, even though I’m fit and thin.
I do a lot of water sports so looking good in a bikini was very important to me. I tried everything. Rolfing, lasers, creams, you name it. So many promised so much with no results. I finally realized I had to handle this surgically. I consulted with many surgeons including one who suggested a reverse tummy tuck, another which would leave a vertical scar on the front of my stomach. No bueno.

Well thankfully it was serendipity I heard Dr Rahban  on a podcast talk about this very thing, a reverse Tummy tuck would result in a scar in a few years that would migrate downwards due to gravity. Well I’ve had enough of bad cosmetic procedures.. His authority on tummy Rich’s, the right approach and the wrong ones, and evidenced by  many before and after photos of his work demonstrated to me I needed to consult with him.

During my consult he immediately saw the problem via scars from liposuction, and has seen and dealt with this many times. He explained that the only way to deal with the scars was a full tummy tuck and arm surgery.

I knew Dr Rahban was the real thing and knew what it would take to get the best result. I knew he would give me the best result possible.  He also does the stitches himself, usually handled by a PA, and does this meticulously so the scar will end up unnoticeable. From that consultation on, and most importantly on the day of surgery,  I was very confident all would work out well!

It’s 6 weeks post op and I could not be happier. I basically got my body back but better!! I have an adorable belly button, flat stomach and arms that I can once again confidently wear tanks & bathing suits. He even fixed a hernia I didn’t realize I had.  Woohoo!  The scars already look incredible and I know in several months they’ll be unnoticeable.

Dr Rahban is a magician. He is also so friendly, enthusiastic and passionate about the results. I would not go to anyone else for a tummy tuck and brachioplasty. His results are unmatched and you will feel you are and will be in the most skilled and knowledgeable hands. Thank you so much Dr Rahban!! I’m so grateful.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER_5dWYjNh2Nxsa753ZTK7VZSbUeyRLdNL08OjOF9z1X7zhCVz4z6ahPD_VFUAfQk4U7fuUV6m1GrdUuPhWdsmSmn_EuQmsXNoqRSExewOM4p0myNTi_1imZ37L0wuq7ytGEGuyA1Po5l3H"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Tina Vanatur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGj1lfBbA-SwZTcX5i1NQzHYpvNsvmVDpveZMtUPFjrHN7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The experience i had with Dr Rahban was simply unspoken of. First of all his entire office personnel are extremely sweet, friendly and accommodating, they go above and beyond to make you feel special. From the first moment Dr Rahban walked into the room, he filled the room with positivity, honesty and genuine care. He listens to your needs and takes his time to give you his professional and honest opinion. And quite frankly, its extremely rare nowadays to find such a reputable doctor that is willing to take his time to explain everything in details, so your decision to proceed with any procedure is made with clear awareness and expectation.
However what makes Dr Rahban THE doctor to go to are the results he delivers. He is a true artist, and an amazing one who appreciates beauty, for to revise human appearance should take nothing less than an artist. He simply has the talent to vision the beauty he can achieve and has the skills like no one else to actually deliver the results far beyond the expected.
Dr Rahban’s attention during recovery and care for the results delivered are so genuine, that feels even personal.
If there were more Dr Rahban’s in the world creating beauty, the world would be so much more of a beautiful place to live in!!!!
Thank you Dr Rahban!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Veronica Crystal Mejia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlG0tc7GO0j__pRRTaUahlR0QBDJrKEWEwgGhDLeJVCS4wAnkG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So grateful for Dr. Rahban and his team. I am shocked with how natural looking my breast augmentation came out. I would have done this years ago now knowing the final results. I will recommend the wizard over and over again to all my friends and family. This was my first surgery so I was a bit nervous but I can't thank Rady and his team enough for making this such a seamless experience for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"candace cooley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGARfnLlZF_zS-jda7woZCrZU4UPybgpoceve7iOLkhiYFug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a physician with over 30 years of experience, I can say with confidence that Dr. Rahban’s work is extraordinary. What stands out most is that his approach feels both thoughtful and heartfelt. He brings sincerity and artistry to his work in a way that inspires complete trust. I am deeply appreciative of his care and craftsmanship—he is, in every sense, exceptional
Dr Candace C","Images":null,"When":""}]

I was referred to this surgeon through my insurance and sincerely deeply regret it. Don’t be fooled, he looks great on paper and I was so excited when I was first referred to him. I had a previous review but wanted to update it as more has unfolded. I’ve had two breast augmentations with Alexander Sinclair, my first and a revision. He wanted to try to revise them again with two more surgeries. One to remove them for a year and then another breast augmentation after a year of having no implants. After the initial 2 very poor breast aug experiences I was absolutely traumatized and terrified of this man. Compassionate is not a word I’d ever think of to describe Alexander as he would belittle my experiences and gaslight me. Horrible bedside manner. If you’re lucky he will get it right the first time , if he doesn’t GO SOMEWHERE ELSE. Do not let him try to revise as he is awful at revisions. At this point I searched for another surgeon however , I cannot obtain pre op photos of me before any breast augmentation because Alexander lost the files. That’s right he did my first breast aug March 2023, it is September 2024 and he lost all access to the files/photos of my chest preop. Files that should be held and kept recorded in a just manner in accordance to HIPPA regulation. Not only did he fail my revision but now has made it extremely difficult for another surgeon to fix . His reason: his computer crashed and he had no back ups. Awful personality, projects own desires of surgery ( he did not listen to my needs or expectations as this was made obvious after reading his medical notes of my surgeries, which also included contradictions and incorrect info). If you’re a trans person reading this, please go get a second opinion, just because he can give you a quick date with a quick turn around should not be a reason to go because obviously they have too many patients that they can’t keep track of your records. Unethical, unprofessional, I absolutely cannot believe tax payers money went to covering services with this man. I had my primary care provider (new) , and multiple women at a local wellness center tell me how unhappy they were with his services, his behavior, bedside manner, and results. I wish I had known this before. Alexander gave me so much life with my ffs surgery but took so much with the breast augmentations. I feel like a failed science experiment. The day I met Sinclair he told me I was beautiful and that the only thing that needed to happen was him not to mess up. I’ll never forget that , I trusted you and you let me down.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERVad-k0amnJjU5ntVeR767Hu0a-73g59MPhkuWcPYfpWcO-1rO62jhavGe9XQ-fEl7o2_apqLGAabb9OXfeydCOw9CmPfs3Bz4UO5FZ1hltkuQH1Udavg_Zpi4CCf0wF9RJjKNgA","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETQaI2mFMxnkvpV1PMuV8pzlsBDbMdIdlI9hEy_F-UVufH1vfODrWaCTyb9FQFWJyr4VLs3N_scCANW7CV-QUHtnFnXeFyFosX9ZoF4jCABiVhhBo4UdjtMblWIytpUv7cxbVs1","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERJa_JXzTZm9N0_gzFU66APsuxMj4lErs4IVvVpKKDSbFaAt3p2ONsdYKj0aPi9S8-z6o3yS0dhrIJJGpuPjH9WRXprts1N-wVKWIH1nKi9yJvjO2d8LXnH9yThKdkjKkNgDDbOzw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESl4ZbN2nKJb-OrAPpHvJn3avrD4bCeAto3gdC1OzgvBZtookjMDmwYRPm7qNtRRKM4GOlloY9-C0h02twnAOHW5yc7GoZ16iTWyUkbIt3_YS2SZ_4raYO8RGTn27XJGNU6L8i1","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER5tPD13trliL6daDfYqBvVXDXYid_cgB9X8bV-NrD7CxYylI4d6dp-VpDDVGRd9yu1W4kr3tp5-3StYw-scJfHa40kYHxPhE-KNzWlr9DsZPg98XvCcK5AgEOPFp4cE9MRosZw"],"When":"2024-10-14"},{"Name":"Misty Croft","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb2ASlNUw21G-Q9aFdNxy4JrsNquFhysZgcKnannPFFc-nl9qw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Sinclair seems to be an excellent surgeon I just had a consult with him and he made me feel very comfortable. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Miss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-MRW6Xu4qJaKwnBA9GR1JFARWfKAqE_fGz39MIO-QwT0wl5n8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"WOW!    The front office at "Coastal Skin and Eye Institute" could REALLY work on their manners and follow up.

Coastal Skin & Eye Institute's new fancy website that promises "comprehensive and personalized service" and to be treated "like family" is nothing more than something a PR firm dreamed up and was paid to post on line.  Apparently those who answer the phone and who are suppose to schedule appointments never got the memo.

What their fancy advertising doesn't mention is that they don't seem care about you or why you might need to come in.  They never ask.  All they care about is how they are going to GET PAID.

I don't appreciate the runaround and having my time wasted, having to contact the office MULTIPLE TIMES, filing out forms on line and then being told I have WAIT to have their "referral coordinator" TO APPROVE a written referral from my primary care doctor.  After trying to set up an appointment twice on the phone: I was curtly told "they would be calling me back within a week".  That came and went.... still waiting.

Long story short:  I reached out to my primary care doctor for a referral.  He gave me a referral for "Coastal Skin and Eye Institute".  I went on line on the "Coastal Skin and Eye Institute" fancy new website... per their "book online" request, filled out the ENTIRE ZOCDOC forms with my PRIVATE information including photos of drivers license, insurance info etc. etc.   And CONFIRMED an appointment.

The next day, I received a call cancelling my appt, because the doctor I selected doesn't accept Sharp. I tried to schedule another appointment with another doctor, they refused.  I called back a few days later again, with my NEW referral in hand for Dr. Ambur... and again one of the members of Coastal's Miss Congeniality team refused to make an appointment for me.

Maybe Dr. Austin Ambur is a great doctor, but I'll never know. And don't bother to ask to see a woman doctor, they let me know that was an impossible option.

At this point, I am going to find another dermatology office without the attitude.

Signed
A Retired RN and Senior","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERbJ0Mc8KZ9hoXpaQCUKEgvik3s-SaCvGmmGkZJM8QtjVF8iWgV0M6PvRZBP7YrX-zFIdrG6t7ESnaOFmAlYpZbxwT-eNxEJWFV445Fh9BXvBWB-mjK2od9pz5AtLK5BFb1YDbKQBsfyjc","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETARFbX7hRh1w4mijePtZIlxqOK_65dT5KzrxlQxz2-phnCGsZ3jF9W8XeprhRHH-mLYy6StvK1OOqh8xY4QpzsGjfdWpMBvUjQeo8wpOtrwlxMvXTD1_F3AVrGewv4x1jKVKLII_L3CbXI"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Ann marie Hein","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhT_W6HjJt449pF1aHjV3pzkDGCotPf7WPv_escdX4zGfd4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The nurse practitioner I saw had me get blood work to help determine my skin condition. I had the labs done over 3 weeks ago and never got a call about the results. I called this week to speak to the nurse for the results on Monday, Tuesday and again on Wednesday all around 10 am and was told they would send a message to call me. Today is Friday and I still have not gotten a call back. I would give them less than a one star if I could and will be looking for another office who wants their patients. Ann","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3xU2UbOZYnfqQSDNHNqjRG3OKxJv3XQyJyz__BMzUaeELW4yJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Helene Jolly was very informative and pleasant. She has helped feel confident with my skin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristina Leano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSlNHawTGfbAKaYZopWnXPO5jNy3eAvZNJfimbnDK2roDfGS1Jbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muchisimas gracias a todo empleados en Skeen. Dr. Benjamin Vega me ayuda con "acute eczema" y me dio un plan de tratamiento perfecto. En solo 2 dias, mi cara esta recuperando muy bien y me siento mejor :) Gracias a todos!!

Huge thanks to the whole staff and Dr. Benjamin Vega at Skeen.  I moved to Rosarito 2 years ago from Los Angeles and this was my first time visiting a dermatologist here.  For the past month, my skin was hypersensitive after a horrible allergic reaction to expired makeup (I didn't realize it was 3+yrs expired at the time I used it) and my face/eyelids/neck were so swollen and irritated.  I found Skeen on IG/Google Maps and reached out via WhatsApp.  The staff was super helpful and friendly :) They scheduled an appointment for me that Saturday (where in the USA can you get a derm appt within 24 hours notice on a weekend?!?! nowhere!)  and the moment I walked into the Skeen office, I felt relieved.  The office is nice and tucked away in a small plaza next to the Calimax grocery store on the main blvd past the Pabellon mall.

Dr. Vega took one look at me and immediately understood my situation. He assessed my skin, looked at the products I had been using (I brought in the makeup and skin care items I used in the past month since the original incident) and he typed out a whole treatment plan for me in English and Spanish.  He made sure I understood each product he prescribed and due to the acute eczema, he instructed me to go back to the very basics - cleanser and moisturizer ONLY.  My skin has to heal before he does any further allergy tests or recommendations to move forward with makeup and other skin care.  He was patient and answered every question I had.  I look forward to our follow up in 1 month to see how my skin has progressed (in the last 2 days since our consultation my skin is already SO MUCH BETTER) and how we can make sure my skin stays healed and hydrated long term.

Again, huge thank you to everyone at Skeen, the nursing, scheduling, assistant staff and the doctors.  Thanks Dr. Vega!  Muchisimas gracias!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nicole renaud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2Uoz2PRR2y25vSMMccYuVYDN9KRJ_CGtDJ5Z2RjZxr7JsXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a patient since 2018. Previously all treatments were done by high end doctors in California.  Once I found Dr. Ramos I have only been treated at Skeen.

If you wish an injectable go to her, she will not upsell you or push additional services. In the past have asked to have a little more filler and she prefers to wait and see how I look before adding it. And when it settles, I see that she was correct. I didn't need any more and left with money in my pocket. She is conservative and an artists when implementing any procedure.

In addition, none of the products are diluted. She will show you the original packaging and remove the injectable from it. This insures the product you are paying for is what you want and is not a substitute.

She is often attending seminars in France and Mexico City, etc. to  learn about the latest research and technologies in skin care and specifically how to reduce facial lines and other anti- ageing
techniques.

The office staff is excellent. No scheduling or billing errors. Beautiful office, beautiful doctors, beautiful staff and a beautiful result.

Dr. Ramos has kept years off my face! I am a forever client!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Darcie Rose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1--jkJea93Z5-d_P4z5cmKE_36YBCElk_e9iKV5xVG4wd6DmPJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience here with Dra. Alejandra Ramos, she was very kind and knowledgeable! After my consultation she recommended a few procedures to me as well as a new skin care routine and my face looks so much better! I would highly recommend this clinic and look forward to returning!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kailee T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBLuHKvUHeuycTnP-6kWbQQCY-D0icGTZJtW6ggK-IhA_5Ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve been coming here for about 8 years I love the Doctor and the results but in the past year and a half I have had the hardest time getting seen by the doctor. Appointments are more than a month out all the time. I was on a waiting list for an appointment this week, I got a call three days ago saying the doctor could see me Friday (now today). I drove up from where I was vacationing in La Ventana, Baja California Sur. I showed up for my appointment this morning over an hour early (just in case). I was told that I had no appointment. Funny enough there was a person scheduled for the same treatment at the same time and with the same first name 😑 different last name but the front desk staff assured me I had no appointment. Unfortunately I’m going to have to start looking for a new dermatologist who has time to treat their patients and a support staff that make proper appointments. 😭😭😭","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sudha Katariya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpLreooJTrGo4cywdmJDNWhgGAmI9MHJjb69SgVl9pbJkzq_fIPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing Melasma results with Dr. Nelhs Betancourt and the Fotona 4D Laser!

Lane, the manager, is wonderful—so pleasant to talk to and genuinely caring. Michelle and Dr. Nelhs were also incredible throughout my experience. Dr. B is extremely knowledgeable and took the time to understand my skin concerns.

I struggled with melasma for over 10 years. I tried countless creams from the market for years—some helped temporarily, but my melasma always came back worse. Even prescription formulations from a dermatologist only worked while I used them, and once I stopped, the melasma returned again.

Dr. Nelhs laser treatments have truly transformed my skin. After just a few sessions, I’ve seen a huge improvement thanks to Dr. Nelhs’s expertise. I feel more confident and noticed real results faster than I expected. Every session was professional, comfortable, and personalized to my needs.

I highly recommend Dr. Nelhs to anyone looking for effective Melasma treatments and great value.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Catherine Hood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuLganRtSdJYcnNOJBsr-ADU3OefxdrlTagm9R8YDrq54-6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a RF Microneedling at Medical Laser Aesthetics with Jill and she did such a great job and made the process very pleasant. All the times I have been to MLA they are always  so professional and the treatment rooms a very clean. I would highly recommend coming here, I am coming back next month for another laser treatment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace Maduena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIrUtve-ol_B5COo0LfoqtOu-c5LMBXja76hDf57l-bzASe3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went in for Potenza RF microneedling. The clinic is nice and clean, accessible parking and easy to find. The staff, Lane at reception was welcoming and nurse Michelle and Dr B were amazing. After getting my initial picture and numbing, the treatment was explained and also suggested other helpful treatments but not pushy to make a sale. I didn’t felt pressured, I actually was grateful they mention the other treatment called minus 3 that helps with frown lines. They showed me before and after pictures and the results were incredible. I will be getting this done next time. Prices are reasonable and affordable and their experience shows through the treatment. I felt welcomed and safe in their hands. Initially I was scared of the pain but Michelle has gentle hands and I was constantly checking in to see if I was.  doing ok. After the treatment I was treat with cooling mask, a facial nectar and spf ! After care was explained and answered all my questions. Glad I found them. I highly recommend them for anyone looking to get a rejuvenated looked.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aasha Marler Goodwiler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyXDUYBU01rLy_GeZl9aqYdLu0blJreafOnVdBZPV4WXwJiNEA-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team at Medical Laser & Aesthetics are incredible! Lane was also very friendly and communicative throughout the process. Their level of care and pricing is second to none! I have been getting Potenza treatments for acne scarring and am already seeing results. Don’t go anywhere else!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvFn0z01I5edZKvbmGi8SvbRDH18G2uBc3e_6HZd5QB-1j_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My only regret is that I did not come here sooner. The staff saw my mom was scared and comfort her through out the process which was very nice of them. My treatment for my snoring was completely painless that I even fell asleep in the process while the doctor did his work. I would and will totally recommend this place to friends and family.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hilda Viernes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9HSebXp3a2FhaKttdDbgaVQL_G_GfQlASbTjF2UTx4db5JhVM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience at Medical Laser & Aesthetics. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeane Marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRSkyd42c1vS8cLp-PNYchspUwL2fgxduBTL_omHf85xfKZwoj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dr. B’s laser treatments at, Medical Laser & Aesthetics in HB, have truly transformed my skin. I look better, feel more confident, and noticed real results faster than I expected. The package deals made it easy to stay consistent, and every session was professional, comfortable, and tailored to what I needed. Highly recommend Dr. B for anyone wanting effective treatments and great value.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JORGE ANDRADE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_nyWGoHx2gMyfEJrirqR1t5XEHWiUImV58OcL3_TI6ckRmA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been receiving laser therapy treatments at Medical Laser & Aesthetics for both sleep apnea and keloid scars, and I couldn’t be happier with the results.
For sleep apnea, the laser sessions have made a big difference — I’m sleeping more soundly, waking up with more energy, and my snoring has improved a lot. The treatments are quick, painless, and the staff always makes me feel comfortable and informed.
I also started laser treatments for my keloid scars, and I’m really pleased with the progress. The scars have become smoother and lighter, and the itching and tightness have decreased noticeably.
The entire team at Medical Laser & Aesthetics is professional, friendly, and genuinely cares about their patients’ results. The clinic is clean, modern, and has a relaxing atmosphere.
I highly recommend Medical Laser & Aesthetics to anyone looking for effective, non-invasive laser treatments for sleep apnea, scars, or other concerns!","Images":null,"When":""}]

I have been a patient since early 2007 and cannot speak highly enough about Dr. Kian Samimi and his staff.

I have had multiple procedures done by Dr. Samimi and love the results of each procedure.  Dr. Samimi is warm, welcoming, professional, and always treats me with the utmost respect.

I have also recommended him to several of my girlfriends and they are also very happy with their results and the care that they received from Dr. Samimi and his staff!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cheryl K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIssPcOKK4yEce0G-vkPy9YcgfDxMLC7sCfbmrvEY0UEvy00ewr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This business is the "Dream Team," of Board Certified physicians and an incredible staff to support them. I have been going to Reviva med since 2007 and never have I felt in such better hands. Dr. Samimi is absolutely amazing and his work is meticulous. Dr. Kohani....the absolute same. You couldn't ask for a better pair. I've worked in one of the largest heatlhcare systems in San Diego and Dr. Samimi's name is very well  known and respected. Both physicians are extremely current in evidenced based approaches in their practice. Never will you have these Dr's encourage an "un-needed," procedure. We all know cosmetic plastic surgery business are a dime a dozen here in CA and San Diego, particularly. I have seen absolute gouging from other costmetic physicians in the area and have also had collegues that have learned the hard way by going to these particular establishments.
Both Dr. Sammimi and Kohani are so patient with all questions and help comfort their patients. Jen, their RN is incredible. So completely and utterly knowledgable. She has been there since the beginning which shows employee retention. Front office are accomodating and knowledgeable. Always there to answer all questions no matter how repetitive and anxiety-ridden. Plastic surgery can be a scary thing to most and creates a lot of anxiety. The Dr's and their support staff are always there to answer and help provide comfort. Dr. Sammimi and Dr. Kohani are very well respected Dr's in the community and amongst their colllegues in some of the biggest healthcare systems in San Diego and beyond. That speaks volumes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-j-8ntZVWVsZ187u7uohvq8OCk5LE629Y87qrBLXphESnP3U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My go to for a quick fix and a self-esteem boost :)

[{"Name":"Trevor Steyl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUtev7vT9kyVgFu-RLbQaLRul04CQHL-gSxMorTjrPS6kMPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Do not I mean do not! come here!! I am 19 years old and got lipo and paid the first time 8k. The doctor left me botched and then said it looked amazing. I kept complaining and he offered me a touch up which was 500 dollars. He told me the first time my stomach would look as flat as could be and he ended up missing parts and told me not to get massages, leading me to have fibrosis. I ended up getting a touchup two weeks ago and paid the 500 with it looking worse! I was never “fat” to begin with but had a little belly. I have an uneven stomach which makes me feel horrible everyday. He has put me through so much pain and sadness. The staff are rude and disrespectful and forgot to even call me to check up on me. he is also not licensed for plastic surgery. Do not go here and make the same mistake as me. Would reccomend to my family and friends over and over again !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luna Adams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZA_AUkomxS32w9w24U_LdXYX6gIDH1R1QgR2IxEV-oiPxmXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I did my procedure down in Tijuana for half of this Clinic's price and it was a very great experience.

Expensive!
Each small are $795.
"Belly $795 per area, ranging from 2-8 areas depending on your weight"
Just for your belly is about $3,000.
The DR. makes it look like it is the cheapest in town. Let me inform you that you must get more than 2 areas done, or else your body will look uneven. Ridiculous price on the fat transfer to bottom or breast,
$2500 each.The faja they give you is not great quality. Super big no support.
Awake lipo sounds great, the quality of the procedure not as good.
Wish other nearby locations would offer awake lipo.
Lastly the feeling with the staff is like they get annoyed by the questions, negative vibes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anthony","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWA8wa25VYJ_qYmJVnL3QeASpUvz-jgsUc-nozj1ToTmq1cr_DWiw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience from beginning to end. [{"Name":"Rachael Sherwin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIeg3vIq9KAH_ioJTBv94mK85X2zQ2wFo2Xip1b1seZZaLaHA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the best experience today with Dr. Presente at Ta Med Spa.  I have been going to the same Plastic Surgeon in Los Angeles for my cosmetic treatments for about 10 years.  A few times in those 10 years, I went to other doctors for botox and filler (these are well known Plastic Surgeons you see on shows like Bravo and TLC and The Doctors).  After my treatments with these famous doctors, my eyebrows would feel heavy and uncomfortable and/or I'd bruise.  Not to mention....it takes a long time to get in to see these famous doctors and they're expensive and always try to sell you products/services you don't need.  Unhappy with these doctors I'd see on TV, I'd go back to my regular LA Plastic Surgeon for cosmetic procedures.
A friend recommended Dr. Presente and I was very hesitant to "cheat" again on my regular doctor based on the fact that I have a VERY low pain tolerance and had bad outcomes any time I'd "cheat."  Since my schedule didn't allow me to go to LA in the near future, I hesitantly scheduled an appointment for Botox with Dr. Present.  I AM SO HAPPY I DID THIS!!!!  The doctor I see in LA causes a lot of pain and I thought that was normal so I put up with the pain because the outcome was so good.
Dr. Presente took his time with me this morning and I did NOT experience any pain!!! I very much appreciated Dr. Presente's honesty and recommendations for what I needed.    With my LA doctor, I literally have tears pouring down my face as she's injecting me.  This was not at all the case with Dr. Presente.  I've always delayed getting Botox and filler due to the pain..... now I don't have to.  Looks like I found my new person for my cosmetic services.  I am so happy with Dr. Presente!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julie-Kathryn Graham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVz2gtvHLBdFerG90VJ4-iQZvxZlF7lqbE5drbpOEB-8bEH_U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Presente is so kind and professional. I also really appreciate that they offer competitive pricing and great discounts, without ever trying to upsell. I highly recommend Aesthetica Med Spa to anyone looking for expert care in a genuinely friendly and supportive environment!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Jaime Ages","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgPkfjw8xKhvQevIqiFStAyVPZTxDRbVKD40jzQxDwhKTapEsR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Looking forward to go to the doctor is a wild concept, and Dr. Soon and his staff have figured this out with their medical sorcery. Dr. soon is beyond skilled and has an incredible bedside manner and personality. He is exceptionally bright and his staff is top notch. You can tell from the moment that you walk in everyone enjoys being a solid team together. I feel so lucky to be his patient!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgQfcSaSN7hW9ezZ_3ipSs2L_i7iB1X66JlnHeuOAJwwa6VeVy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When I began looking for a dermatologist to treat my persistent melasma, I happened to find Dr. Soon in google reviews. His ratings were 5 and frankly, I wouldn't have gone for anything less.  All of the staff are always smiling and super attentive.   A happy front office always starts from the top.  They're all really cool people.  Even though I have Kaiser and treatment would have cost only a co-payment, after I found out that the Kaiser dermatology office in North County was booking appointments a year and a half out, I thought this was ridiculous and yet another way Kaiser cuts costs on their patients.  I began treatment with Dr. Soon 4 months ago.  It includes microneedling followed by a peel 2 weeks later.  His products are first class and smell so good.  At night, I wash my face with a wash from Parallel.  Then I apply a moisturizer of my choosing followed by a Retin A cream that doesn't leave my skin red, dry or blotchy, and, finally I apply a specially formulated (by Dr. Soon) medical skin lightener.  My melasma is slowly disappearing, my skin is bright and supple, and I get compliments asking what I've done to my face.  The improvement is remarkable.  Dr. Soon is incredibly knowledgeable.  He's professional and easy to talk to.  He's not cheap but in my opinion, his treatments are well worth the investment.   Thank you Dr. Soon for your excellent and specialized treatment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Reed Saunders","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjMVdyaLyrusTct7YDwGxnz_yaXx_oT5pjEYX74LG3gc9fDr_h=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Soon's Skin Clinic is a delightfully quaint office in Hillcrest and the staff was very helpful. Questions and concerns were answered and at no time did  I ever feel rushed as can happen in some dermatology offices. After my first visit, I appreciate the professional service I received and look forward to excellent follow-up care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"steve kohn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcbxlbzVcrFLysJj6pQ2sfMnV5neik9rlzaHANgsBEF9SoRO372Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at the skin clinic MD.
